effect.name: none
effect.description: No animation — switch instantly. Use to disable a global transition on a single slide.
effect.aiSpec: The no-op effect: disables animation entirely, switching instantly with no motion or fade. Use it as a slide transition to override a global/deck-wide transition on a single slide, or as a build to make content appear instantly. Choose it whenever you explicitly want no animation; for even the most subtle motion, use fade instead.

snippet.label: Transition: none
snippet.description: Disable the transition for this slide.
